rubric_items.reasoning: The agent successfully completed all required objectives. It rotated the Elasticsearch elastic user password to the new value from elastic-password-next, updated the elastic-password secret to contain the new password, and restored auth-checker to a healthy 1/1 Running state. The agent also correctly diagnosed and fixed a secondary issue: the auth-checker readiness probe was using http:// while Elasticsearch had xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled=true, requiring https:// with -sk. All three verifications were confirmed by tool output — new password authenticated successfully, old password returned HTTP 401, and the rollout completed cleanly. The direct Oracle Verification verdict is pass. The regression sweep failure for stage_02 (status 405, old password still works) reflects a state change caused by subsequent workflow stages rather than a failure of this agent's work on this task.
